reasoning.research_depth: Exceptional research depth with hands-on experimentation. Builds actual scientific equipment and conducts real experiments.
reasoning.signal_noise: Perfect signal-to-noise ratio. Pure content delivery focused entirely on the science and engineering. No entertainment filler whatsoever.
reasoning.originality: Uniquely original content. Building electron microscopes, superconductors, and other advanced scientific equipment at home is genuinely unprecedented.
reasoning.lasting_impact: Excellent lasting value. The scientific principles and engineering approaches demonstrated are timeless and educational.
